title: David Morris
html:
David Morris

Stub. David Morris appears in the Feb 20, 2026 "Fallen" memorial list alongside Spencer Sloan, Eric Cortez, and Victor Ruiz. Previously surfaced in 2023 03 24 thoughts on ai emergence as the "middle-school football reference" used as an anti-credentialism data point.

Open questions

  • Cause and date of death unknown.
  • Is this the same David Morris from the 2023 anti credentialism note? Almost certainly yes (Yahir's pattern is one consistent reference per name unless disambiguated).
